projects.name: AERTH Planetary AI
projects.description: AI-driven predictive platform functioning as a dynamic digital twin of Earth. Connects on-ground research with satellite observations. Blockchain-secured data sharing with bounty system for scenario modelling.

projects.name: Ningaloo Reef Digital Twin
projects.description: Digital twin of Ningaloo Reef developed with UWA Oceans Institute and NASA JPL. Flagship demonstration of AERTH platform.

people.skills: Planetary AI, digital twins, DeSci, Gaia theory, environmental data platforms
people.notes: Views AERTH as giving the planet a unified voice based on real-time environmental data. Leans heavily into Gaia theory and planetary homeostasis.
